blocker.summary: Published v1.5.0-rc.2 image includes the director-action parser and command module, but /app/scripts/amof.py does not dispatch director-action.
details: The controlplane image was correctly built from v1.5.0-rc.2 and deployed with AMOF_CODE_ROOT=/app.
The in-image files /app/scripts/amof/cli.py and /app/scripts/amof/commands/director_action.py contain the action.
The in-image entrypoint /app/scripts/amof.py lacks cmd_director_action dispatch.
Running /usr/local/bin/python /app/scripts/amof.py -e gmd director-action gmd-dev-local-proof exits 0 without printing the action result and without writing the requested result artifact.
Therefore the queued run status alone is not sufficient evidence of a successful proof on the released runtime.
blocker.required_fix: Add director-action dispatch to repos/amof/scripts/amof.py, land it to canonical main, create the next local RC, rebuild controlplane from that release commit, then rerun the gmd-dev proof.
